programmes.show_description: Alone: Max Pushed To The Max. Constantly on the run to avoid territorial rhinos, elephants and lions, survivalist Max takes on the punishing African Savannah. S1, Ep5
Alone: Bugging Out. In the darkness of the Belize jungle, Kim Kelly is surrounded only by torrential downpours, infuriating ticks, and howler monkeys. S1, Ep6

Roanoke Chamber Of Commerce. The Dawgs save pieces from the Roanoke Chamber of Commerce, including safe deposit boxes and a pneumatic messaging system. S5, Ep13
St. Michael's Catholic School. The team heads to St. Michael's Catholic School in Pittsburgh. They brave high-wire heights in order to save elements of the past. S6, Ep1
Breaking Point. Still reeling from deadly typhoon Hagibis, the fleet claws its way back into competition against the Russians - and the pressure to make up ground has mounted. S16, Ep3
Shotguns And Fist Fights. With the Russian menace looming, co-captains Johnathan and Jake blast a shotgun at their problems while a vicious fist fight breaks out on the Seabrooke. S16, Ep4
Double Agent. The Cornelia Marie taps American satellites to spy on the Russians while Scott Campbell Jr. pioneers a long-dormant fishery. And, Wild Bill faces big setbacks. S16, Ep5
The Bleeding Edge. Johnathan goes under the knife at sea and Junior bets it all while chasing the elusive Golden King crab. Plus, Wild Bill faces an unruly greenhorn. S16, Ep6
A Barrel Full Of Nuts. The Bushmen's drill rig loses a vital pin, forcing 74-year-old Les to undertake repairs four meters in the air. The Digi Diggers flooded mine wall collapses. S6, Ep17
High Goals. The Bushmen struggle to locate the source of water flooding their mine. The Misfits are forced to work Issy's mine Honey Hole as they wait for bulldozer repairs. S6, Ep18
From The Last Hole. The Bushmen bring in a master opal cutter, hoping to transform rough stones into a $100,000 haul. Sofia and Isaac are threatened by a mine roof collapse. S6, Ep19
Deep in the heart of the Australian Outback lie some of the largest gems on the planet. Passionate teams take big risks to hunt down these elusive treasures. S1, Ep2
The Richardsons hunt for fresh sapphire grounds. Will this big gamble pay off? Lost underground, the Mifsuds have a radical solution. Ray and Paul enter a danger zone. S1, Ep3
A tangle with a jack hammer could cost the Mifsuds a huge sapphire. The Rubyvale rocks bring the Old Timers unstuck, while Brianna faces her own set of disasters. S1, Ep4
A machinery problem adds more woes to the Dust Devils' nightmare start. Shane and Russell find gold, while the Poseidon Crew hunt for an intruder. S6, Ep2
Machinery breakdowns cause tensions to rise in the Poseidon Crew. The Ferals are moved onto a new lease, and the Gold Timers get stranded. S6, Ep3
An old treasure map leads the Poseidon Crew to a big nugget. Marcus and Linden call in some expert help, while Shane and Russell take a financial gamble. S6, Ep4
Family Secrets. Cindy struggles to deal with the painful secrets buried in her hoarding disorder and Pam must deal with her collecting to literally make room for her grandchildren. S1, Ep9
I Can't Breathe. Larina is on the verge of losing custody of her child due to her hoarding. But when confronted to let go of her clutter, her compulsion threatens to win the battle. S3, Ep9
Gold Rush Ghost House. A shadowy figure spies on a paranormal investigator, a man and his son stumble upon a talkative Bigfoot and a UFO is spotted on the Las Vegas strip. S7, Ep11
Nowhere To Run. Paranormal investigators Amy Bruni and Adam Berry help a mother left home alone with her kids after terrifying apparitions drove away her family. S4, Ep1
Silent Fear. Paranormal investigators Amy Bruni and Adam Berry and psychic medium Chip Coffey help a family who are being haunted by a demented creature. S4, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Dad With No Limbs: Body Bizarre
programmes.show_description: Dad With No Limbs. Three-year-old Ana suffers from a brain crushing prematurely fused skull. Alex had septicaemia that rapidly led to the amputation of all four of his limbs. S6, Ep3

Space Case. The baggage battlers head to a government auction in Sacramento, California. Mark Meyer cuts into the Martin's profit by bidding high on a box of knives. S3, Ep6
Two-Faced. The baggage battlers head to a police auction in Stockton, California, where one of the auction specialists discover a mask mould of a famous Hollywood icon. S3, Ep7
What a Dummy. The Baggage Battlers head to a police auction in Stockton, California. There are plenty of valuable items to choose from, including a vintage slot machine. S3, Ep2
Lady Luck. The baggage battlers head to an esteemed estate sale in St. Paul, where they bid on items ranging from automotive parts and a rare doll to a hockey mascot costume. S3, Ep3
Blow Up. The baggage battlers head to an unclaimed crate auction Tucson, Arizona and things really heat up when one of the experts tests a vintage bomb detonator. S3, Ep4
Mike Tyson's Punch Out. The baggage battlers head to an estate auction in Jacksonville, Florida, where pop culture collectibles and sealed boxes are amongst the items on offer. S3, Ep5
Space Case. The baggage battlers head to a government auction in Sacramento, California. Mark Meyer cuts into the Martin's profit by bidding high on a box of knives. S3, Ep6
Two-Faced. The baggage battlers head to a police auction in Stockton, California, where one of the auction specialists discover a mask mould of a famous Hollywood icon. S3, Ep7
Guns a-Blazin'. The baggage battlers head to a cowboy auction in California, where they duel over items dating back to the legendary Buffalo Bill and the Barnum & Bailey circuses. S3, Ep8
Platinum Hits. The baggage battlers head to a music icons auction in New York. They find a gold disc for the Pink Floyd album 'Dark Side Of The Moon' and a nude photo of Madonna. S3, Ep9
One Car Wonder. It's Wayne's 1938 Lincoln Model K coupe vs. a 1938 Packard when Wayne and his friend compete at a car competition. Later, Wayne searches for the perfect Bugatti. S11, Ep1
Wayne's Gotta Wait. A trip to buy a rare American-Yale motorcycle gives Wayne the perfect excuse to visit a collection of hot rods. He sets his eyes on a 1950 Oldsmobile 88. S11, Ep2
No Replacement For Displacement. Wayne buys the ultimate dream car: an all-original 1955 Mercedes 300 SL 'Gullwing' that's been hidden from the public eye for decades. S11, Ep3
(AC) Ace In The Hole. Wayne is in Virginia to help sell an impeccable 1958 AC Ace Bristol roadster. In California, a 1968 Toyota Corona makes an unforgettable impression. S11, Ep4
Where's The Gold Paulie. A car doesn't always need to be totally rebuilt. Dave swaps the chassis and upgrade performance for a 1955 Nomad to give the car the edge it was missing. S5, Ep9
Dave Kindig, Guest Judge. Car show season is always a big time of year for the crew, but a show has called with a special request. They want Dave to be a judge and present an award. S5, Ep10
Veruca Violet. Corvette enthusiast Rick Cox has brought in his '63 Corvette to take it to the next level. He wants some serious upgrades, including a huge LS X engine. S5, Ep11
Finishing The Ember Glow Hemi. Shorty tries to match the Ember Glow hemi's original colour, Joel installs an aftermarket AC, and the crew works on the interior and trim. S2, Ep5
Training Day Lowrider. A big fan of 'Training Day' wants his '78 Monte Carlo built in the same vein, with a swapped LS, beefed-up brakes and suspension, and a new interior. S2, Ep6
Debris Of Amelia Earhart. Jeremy explores aircraft debris that may be linked to the disappearance of Amelia Earhart. Plus, he examines an ancient anchor in the Mediterranean. S2, Ep5
Titanic Phenomenon. Jeremy Wade explores a ground-breaking scientific discovery that could change everything known about the most infamous shipwreck, the Titanic. S2, Ep6
Into The Storm. A dangerous storm threatens to shut down the operation just as Darrell and team discover gold ore in the remains of an old wreck. S2, Ep7
Striking Gold. Leading to one of the richest finds in Darrell's career, the team discovers ornate artefacts that indicate the location of a 16th century captain's quarters. S2, Ep8
Secrets Of Mackinac. Jess and Phil are joined by The Ghost Brothers as they continue to investigate Mackinac Island's mysteries. They explore a lighthouse with a dark past. S4, Ep2
